title: Seattle, WA - World's First Service Station Site - Roadside America
content: The station that was once on this site opened in 1907. Located at/near 2225 East Marginal Way South, Seattle, WA

title: The World's First Service Station - The View from a Drawbridge
content: shabbiest parts of Seattle. this marker is controversial. It actually provided service, they say, amounted to single pumps with garden hoses.

title: Commemorating the world's first service station site - Facebook
content: John McLean builds what some say is the world's first gasoline service station at Holgate Street and Western Avenue in Seattle.

title: TOP 10 BEST Gas & Service Stations in Seattle, WA - Yelp
content: The staff was friendly. The bathrooms were absolutely disgusting tho. The value wasn't bad for the gas. There's a wide selection of snacks ( chips, candy, soda

title: Seattle's first US service station location - Facebook
content: Early gasoline was so volatile that you drained your tank when you were done and kept the gas in a sealed container.
